installation_requirements.surface: Hard, level surface capable of sustaining the load

specifications.hand_crank: High gear ratio for one-handed operation

features: Raises full-sized dually tires up to 48 inches
Hand crank with high gear ratio for one-handed operation
Two rear 360-degree swivel casters with locks
Safety chain to secure caster locks
Compatible with any above-ground or in-ground lift
safety_features: Swivel caster locks with safety chain
Lower lifting arms and center/secure load before moving
Use load restraint device to secure tire
Use only on hard, level surfaces
notes: Designed for single and dual tire handling on heavy-duty trucks
